class.name: Captain
class.description: Decisive leaders and brilliantstrategists, Captains inspire their allies to greatness. They stand alongsidetheir Cohorts—their devoted lieutenants—whom they entrust with their lives.

starting_equipment.items: Chain Mail, Shield,Longsword, 6 Javelins, Explorer’s Pack, and 27 GP
Studded Leather Armor, 2 Shortswords, Longbow, 20 Arrows, Quiver, Explorer’sPack, and 13 GP

class_features.name: Battle Tactics
class_features.description: You learn maneuversfueled by Battle Dice. You have two d6 Battle Dice. You regain all expendedBattle Dice when you roll Initiative or finish a Short or Long Rest. SavingThrow DC = 8 + Strength or Dexterity modifier + Proficiency Bonus.

class_features.name: Weapon Mastery
class_features.description: You can use the masteryproperties of two kinds of weapons of your choice with which you haveproficiency. You can change these choices whenever you finish a Long Rest.

class_features.name: Cohort
class_features.description: You gain a loyal Cohort. Youchoose a stat block (Berserker, Champion, Cultist, Hunter, Mage, Minstrel,Priest, Scoundrel, or Templar) and initiate them over 8 hours. In combat, theCohort takes its turn immediately before or after yours. It uses your Charismafor attack and damage rolls. Its Save DC = 8 + your Charisma modifier +Proficiency Bonus.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.description: You gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice. You can replace it with adifferent one whenever you gain a Captain level.

class_features.name: Captain Subclass
class_features.description: You gain a Captain subclass of your choice,granting features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

class_features.name: AbilityScore Improvement
class_features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feator another feat for which you qualify. You gain this feature again atlevels 8, 12, and 16.

class_features.name: Blitz
class_features.description: Once oneach of your turns, you can direct your Cohort or an ally within 60 feet to takea Reaction to move up to its Speed or make one attack with a weapon or UnarmedStrike.

class_features.name: Valiant Surge
class_features.description: Whenever youor your Cohort score a Critical Hit or reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points, youregain an expended Battle Die.

class_features.name: Coordinated Strike
class_features.description: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon attack, you deal anextra 2d8 damage if your Cohort has dealt damage to that target since the end ofyour last turn.

class_features.name: Lead by Example
class_features.description: Whenever you or your Cohort score a Critical Hit, each ally you choosewithin 30 feet gains Heroic Inspiration.

class_features.name: TeamworkManeuvers
class_features.description: When you use a maneuver that targets an ally, youcan target a second ally within range without expending an additional BattleDie.

class_features.name: Epic Boon
class_features.description: You gain an EpicBoon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

class_features.name: Legendary Commander
class_features.description: Immediately afteranother creature’s turn, you can choose yourself or an ally within 60 feet totake a Legendary Action (Attack, Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Hide, Magic [cantriponly], or Utilize). You have three uses per Short or Long Rest.

maneuvers.name: Bolster
maneuvers.description: Bonus Action: Expend 1Battle Die to motivate an ally within 60 feet. Their next attack before yournext turn adds the Battle Die to the attack and damage roll.

maneuvers.name: BornLeader
maneuvers.description: When you fail a Wisdom or Charisma check, expend 1Battle Die to add it to the roll. Once per turn.

maneuvers.name: Morale Boost
maneuvers.description: Reaction: When an ally within 60 feet fails a saving throw,expend 1 Battle Die and add it to the roll.

maneuvers.name: Rally
maneuvers.description: Bonus Action: Expend 1 Battle Die to heal an ally within 60 feetfor [Battle Die roll + Charisma modifier] HP. Cannot heal a creature at 0 HP.

maneuvers.name: Staggering Strike
maneuvers.description: Bonus Action (on hit):Expend 1 Battle Die to daze the target. Add the die to damage; the targetsubtracts the die from its next attack roll before the end of your next turn.

features.name: Covert Tactics
features.description: Gain proficiency in Sleight of Hand andStealth. Add Charisma modifier to Initiative. Take the Hide action as a BonusAction.

features.name: Effortless Dodge [Maneuver]
features.description: Bonus Action: Expend 1 Battle Die to take the Disengage or Dodge action. Cannotuse while wearing Medium or Heavy armor.

features.name: FlankingStrike
features.description: When you hit with a weapon attack, the next attack rollmade by an ally against that target before the end of your next turn hasAdvantage.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: You and yourCohort take no damage on successful Dexterity saves against area effects, andhalf damage on failures.

features.name: Preemptive Strike
features.description: Reaction: When a creature within 30 feet attacks you, make oneweapon attack against them first. Regain use on Short/Long Rest or byexpending 1 Battle Die.

features.name: Critical Focus
features.description: Weapon/Unarmed attackscrit on 19-20. Chain Critical: Critting or reducing an enemy to 0 HP increasescrit range (18-20, then 17-20, then 16-20) for 1 minute.

features.name: Rampage [Maneuver]
features.description: Reaction (after crit or reducingenemy to 0 HP with melee): Expend 1 Battle Die to move up to your Speed and makea melee attack. Add Battle Die to damage.

features.name: MartialRecovery
features.description: Bonus Action: Regain all expended Battle Dice. Onceper Long Rest.

features.name: Bloody Spectacle
features.description: When you crit or reduce an enemy to 0 HP, force chosen creatures in a 30-footemanation to make a Wisdom save or be Frightened for 1 minute. Regain use onShort/Long Rest or by expending 1 Battle Die.

features.name: Coupde Grâce [Maneuver]
features.description: Bonus Action (on hit): Expend 2 BattleDice to attempt execution. Add dice to damage. If target drops to 0 HP, no diceare expended.

features.name: Eagle Eye [Maneuver]
features.description: Once per turn when you miss aranged attack, expend 1 Battle Die and add it to the roll.

features.name: Close-Quarters Shooting
features.description: Being within 5 feet of anenemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on ranged attacks. Cohort also gains thisbenefit.

features.name: Vantage Point
features.description: Gain ClimbSpeed equal to your Speed. Gain Advantage on ranged attacks made from 15+ feetabove the target.

features.name: Counter-Shot [Maneuver]
features.description: Reaction: When an enemy hits a creature with a ranged attack,expend 1 Battle Die to subtract it from their attack roll.

features.name: Hundred-Arrow Volley
features.description: Replace one attack with ArrowRain (10ft radius, 40ft high cylinder) or Scatter Shot (20ft cone). Makeseparate attack rolls for each target.

features.name: Theological Studies
features.description: GainReligion proficiency and add Charisma to Religion checks. Learn two Clericcantrips (Charisma-based).

features.name: Minor Miracle
features.description: Rally heals 2 Battle Dice + Charisma. Can heal creatures at 0HP. Increases to 4 Battle Dice at level 10.

features.name: ZealousFervor
features.description: Blitz allows Charmed/Frightened allies to reroll saves.Blitz attacks deal an extra 1d6 Radiant damage.

features.name: Auraof Reprieve
features.description: Magic Action: 15ft emanation for 1 minute. Alliesstarting turns there choose: 2d8 Temp HP, Resistance to non-physical damage, orend Blinded/Deafened/Paralyzed/Poisoned. Regain use on Short/Long Rest or byexpending 2 Battle Dice.

features.name: Raise Cohort
features.description: Cast Raise Dead without a slot. If used on Cohort, no materialcomponents needed and no initiation period required. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Skirmish[Maneuver]
features.description: Bonus Action: Expend 1 Battle Die to make anattack. One attack must be melee and the other ranged.

features.name: Scallywag
features.description: You and your Cohort gain a Swim Speed equal to yourSpeed.

features.name: Fancy Footwork
features.description: When you hita Large or smaller creature with a melee weapon, force it to move 5ft and youcan move 5ft without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

features.name: Dirty Tactics
features.description: Once per turn on melee hit, choose: Flank(Cohort gets Advantage), Pocket Sand (Target gets Disadvantage), or Trip (Targetfalls Prone).

features.name: All Hands on Deck
features.description: Bonus Action: Allies within 30ft get Advantage on their next D20 test. Usesequal to Charisma modifier per Long Rest.

features.name: Commanding Presence
features.description: IfBorn Leader fails, the Battle Die is not expended.

features.name: Challenge [Maneuver]
features.description: Bonus Action (on hit): Expend 1 BattleDie to goad target. Add die to damage. Target has Disadvantage on attacksagainst others while you are within 5ft.

features.name: HighMorale
features.description: Use Morale Boost for multiple creatures failing thesame save for only 1 Battle Die.

features.name: Vengeful Gambit
features.description: Reaction: When a challenged creature hits you, gain Resistanceto that damage and make an attack against them.

features.name: Heroic Leadership
features.description: Using Bolster or Rally grants the targetHeroic Inspiration.

features.name: Iron Wall [Maneuver]
features.description: Bonus Action:Expend 1 Battle Die. Add roll to AC against the next hit within 1 minute.Requires Heavy Armor.

features.name: Siege Defense
features.description: Can replace weapon mastery with Push or Slow. Gain +2 to ranged attacks whilein cover.

features.name: Armored Redirection
features.description: Reaction: Force an attack hitting an ally within 5ft to target you instead.Regain use on Short/Long Rest or by expending 1 Battle Die.

features.name: Mettle
features.description: You and your Cohort take no damage onsuccessful Constitution saves against half-damage effects, and half damage onfailures.

features.name: Iron Retribution
features.description: When a creature within 5ft misses you, strike them with a Shield (no action) for 3d6Bludgeoning damage.
